message:
feat: add speculative expert prefetching (Strategy 1)

Implement speculative prefetching to hide SSD latency by predicting
which experts will be needed based on previous token's selections.

Changes:
- Add prefetchHint() API to ExpertCache for non-blocking prefetch
- Add getOrLoadPrefetch() for unprotected entry loading
- Track last_token_experts[32][2] in MixtralLazyEngine
- Prefetch first 8 layers' experts at token start

Strategy notes:
- Prefetched entries use generation current-3 (can be evicted)
- Only prefetch first 8 layers to avoid cache thrashing
- Limited benefit on 16GB Mac due to cache size constraints
- Would be more effective on 32GB+ systems

Benchmark results show marginal impact due to:
- 8GB cache can only hold ~300 of 768 expert tensors
- Prediction accuracy ~50-60% not high enough to overcome overhead
- Prefetch overhead adds latency without proportional benefit
